findings.title: Dynamic code execution via re.compile()
findings.description: Code uses re.compile() to execute dynamically constructed code
findings.code_snippet:
raw_lines = text.split("\n")
    agent_prefixes = re.compile(
        r"^(?:assistant|agent|ai|bot|claude|gpt|you)\s*[:\>]\s*",
findings.remediation: Use ast.literal_eval() for safe evaluation. Avoid re.compile() with untrusted input.

findings.title: Persistence mechanism reference
findings.description: Code references persistence path: \b(?:nginx|apache|systemd|cron|env|dotenv|\.env)\b
findings.remediation: Skills should not install system services or modify startup configuration.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for formatter skill: shell
findings.description: A 'formatter' skill would not normally require 'shell' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: file_read, file_write
findings.remediation: Review why a formatter skill needs shell access.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for formatter skill: network
findings.description: A 'formatter' skill would not normally require 'network' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: file_read, file_write
findings.remediation: Review why a formatter skill needs network access.
